channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australia’s Struggle to Confront its Role in the Christchurch Terror Attack
item.description: The 2019 Christchurch mosque shootings, which saw a white supremacist kill 51 worshippers in New Zealand, remain a painful and unresolved tragedy. As New Zealanders marked the seventh anniversary of t...

item.title: Middle East Conflict: Live Updates on Israel-Iran Tensions (March 23, 2026)
item.description: The Middle East is experiencing heightened tensions following a night of Iranian missile strikes targeting Israel, as of March 23, 2026. Reports indicate that dozens of Israelis have sustained injurie...

item.title: Premier League derby paused as player subjected to racist abuse
item.description: The Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Sunderland at St James' Park was temporarily halted after reports of discriminatory abuse directed at Sunderland player Lutsharel Geertruida durin...

item.title: Arundhati Ghosh on Love, Polyamory, and Questioning Societal Norms Around Relationships
item.description: In an insightful interview with Scroll.in, Arundhati Ghosh, author of 'All Our Loves: Journeys with Polyamory in India', opens up about love, desire, and intimacy with remarkable honesty. Ghosh explai...

item.title: First person charged under new law criminalising entry to football matches without a ticket
item.description: A new piece of legislation, the Unauthorised Entry to Football Matches Act 2026, came into force on Sunday 22 March 2026, making it a criminal offence in England and Wales to enter or attempt to enter...

item.title: South Africa issues over 3 000 gambling licences yearly with bookmaker surge prompting regulation worries
item.description: South Africa’s gambling sector continues to expand rapidly, with more than 3 000 licences issued to operators each year. Official figures show 3 135 licences were granted in the 2024/2025 financial ye...

item.title: President Tinubu Congratulates Tony Elumelu on 63rd Birthday, Recognises His Impact on African Entrepreneurship
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don extend birthday wishes to Tony Elumelu, di prominent Nigerian economist, banker and philanthropist, as e turn 63 on 22nd March 2026. Tinubu describe am as African business ic...

item.title: ASX futures fall amid heightened US-Iran tensions and rising oil prices
item.description: The Australian sharemarket is expected to open lower following a sharp escalation in tensions between the US and Iran. US President Donald Trump issued a stern ultimatum demanding Iran fully open the ...

item.title: SEC Closes Four-Year Investigation into Faraday Future Without Enforcement Action
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has closed its nearly four-year investigation into electric vehicle startup Faraday Future, despite staff recommendations last year to pursue enforcement ac...

item.title: Steve’s Music Store in Toronto closes its Queen Street West location after nearly 50 years
item.description: After nearly five decades as a beloved fixture in Toronto’s Queen Street West neighbourhood, Steve’s Music Store held its final day of operations on Sunday. The iconic retailer, known for its bold yel...

item.title: Keir Starmer and Donald Trump call for reopening of the Hormuz Strait amid escalating tensions
item.description: In a recent conversation, UK Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer and US President Donald Trump discussed the importance of reopening the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's busiest shipping routes, after...

item.title: Opposition leaders accuse government of plotting to arrest Gachagua ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: On Sunday, March 22, 2026, opposition leaders from the United Opposition, including Kalonzo Musyoka and Eugene Wamalwa, accused the government of planning to arrest Rigathi Gachagua, the leader of the...

item.title: NHL reporter Jessi Pierce and her three children die in Minnesota house fire
item.description: Jessi Pierce, a 37-year-old journalist who covered the Minnesota Wild for NHL.com over the past decade, tragically died in a house fire at her home in White Bear Lake, Minnesota, early on Saturday, 21...

item.title: Driver of Dean at Ahmedabad's Sola Civil Hospital Arrested After Being Caught Filming Female Patient in X-Ray Room
item.description: In a concerning incident at Sola Civil Hospital in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, the driver attached to the Dean's office was arrested by police after he was caught secretly filming a woman patient inside the X...

item.title: Weather Update: Cloudy Conditions in Delhi and Yellow Alert for Himachal Pradesh Due to Landslide
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast generally cloudy weather in Delhi, with the maximum temperature expected around 30°C and the minimum near 16°C. This follows a slightly cooler tr...

item.title: Former BC Ferries CEO reflects on 2006 Queen of the North sinking that claimed two lives
item.description: Twenty years after the tragic sinking of the Queen of the North ferry on March 22, 2006, former BC Ferries president and CEO David Hahn shared his recollections of one of the darkest days in the compa...

item.title: UK Increases Immigration Detention Capacity Following Nigeria-UK Deportation Agreement

item.title: Lahiri shines as Crushers narrowly defeat Southern Guards at LIV Golf SA
item.description: Indian golfer Anirban Lahiri played a decisive role as the Crushers clinched a narrow victory over Louis Oosthuizen’s Southern Guards at the LIV Golf South Africa team event held at Steyn City. Despit...

item.title: Tom Brady Praises Logan Paul's Performance in Flag Football Classic
item.description: NFL legend Tom Brady offered high praise for WWE star Logan Paul after the Fanatics Flag Football Classic on March 21, 2026. Despite a heated feud between the two leading up to the game, Brady express...

item.title: Stormers climb to second on United Rugby Championship standings with 29-21 victory over Dragons
item.description: The Stormers produced a solid performance at home in Cape Town on Sunday, securing a 29-21 victory against the Dragons in the United Rugby Championship. This result propelled the Cape side up to secon...
